import React from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "../styles/Dashboard.css"; import { MessageCircle, Smile, Moon, AlertTriangle, Clock, LogOut, } from "lucide-react"; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (

Dashboard Loaded ✅

Welcome to your Mental Health Assistant

{/* ✅ GENERAL CHAT – NAVIGATES TO CHAT PAGE */}
navigate("/chat")} style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} >

General Chat

Talk freely with your AI therapist

{/* OTHER CARDS – NO CHANGE */}

Mood Tracker

Track your daily emotions

Sleep Tracker

Understand your sleep patterns

Crisis Support

Immediate help when you need it

Chat History

Review past conversations

{/* LOGOUT */}
navigate("/")} style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} >

Logout

Safely exit your account

); } export default Dashboard;
